---
title: "Correlation Analysis: TS% and eFG%"
author: "Matthew Arteaga"

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    df-print: paged

editor: visual
---

## Settings

```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("./.venv", required = TRUE)
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.style.use("ggplot")
from scipy.stats import pearsonr
from nba_api.stats.endpoints import LeagueDashTeamStats
from nba_api.stats.endpoints import LeagueGameLog
import time


# LAST 10 COMPLETED SEASONS

SEASONS = [
    "2014-15",
    "2015-16",
    "2016-17",
    "2017-18",
    "2018-19",
    "2019-20",
    "2020-21",
    "2021-22",
    "2022-23",
    "2023-24"
]

# FUNCTION: REGULAR SEASON DATA

def get_regular_season_stats(season):

    # Pulls team-level regular season TS% and EFG%
    

    stats = LeagueDashTeamStats(
        season=season,
        season_type_all_star="Regular Season",
        measure_type_detailed_defense="Advanced"
    )

    df = stats.get_data_frames()[0]

    print(df.columns)  # optional debugging

    keep_cols = [
        "TEAM_NAME",
        "TS_PCT",
        "EFG_PCT"
    ]

    df = df[keep_cols].copy()

    df.rename(columns={
        "TS_PCT": "REG_TS_PCT",
        "EFG_PCT": "REG_EFG_PCT"
    }, inplace=True)

    df["SEASON"] = season

    return df
  
# FUNCTION: PLAYOFF WIN%

def get_playoff_win_pct(season):
    
    # Computes playoff win percentage by team
    # from playoff game logs
    

    logs = LeagueGameLog(
        season=season,
        season_type_all_star="Playoffs",
        player_or_team_abbreviation="T"
    )

    df = logs.get_data_frames()[0]

    # Keep needed columns
    df = df[["TEAM_NAME", "WL"]].copy()

    # Convert wins/losses to numeric
    df["WIN"] = df["WL"].apply(lambda x: 1 if x == "W" else 0)

    # Aggregate
    summary = (
        df.groupby("TEAM_NAME")
        .agg(
            PLAYOFF_GAMES=("WIN", "count"),
            PLAYOFF_WINS=("WIN", "sum")
        )
        .reset_index()
    )

    summary["PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"] = (
        summary["PLAYOFF_WINS"] /
        summary["PLAYOFF_GAMES"]
    )

    summary["SEASON"] = season

    return summary
```

## Collecting Data

```{python}
#| eval: false

all_data = []

for season in SEASONS:

    print(f"Pulling data for {season}...")

    try:
        reg_df = get_regular_season_stats(season)

        # Small delay to avoid rate limiting
        time.sleep(1)

        playoff_df = get_playoff_win_pct(season)

        merged = pd.merge(
            reg_df,
            playoff_df,
            on=["TEAM_NAME", "SEASON"],
            how="inner"
        )

        all_data.append(merged)

        time.sleep(1)

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error on {season}: {e}")

# Combine all seasons
final_df = pd.concat(all_data, ignore_index=True)

# --------------------------------------------
# SAVE DATA
# --------------------------------------------

final_df.to_csv("nba_ts_efg_playoff_winpct.csv", index=False)

print("\nSaved dataset:")
print(final_df.head())
```

## Correlation Analysis

```{python}
final_df = pd.read_csv("nba_ts_efg_playoff_winpct.csv")

```

```{python}
#| echo: false
# TS% correlation
ts_corr, ts_p = pearsonr(
    final_df["REG_TS_PCT"],
    final_df["PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"]
)

# EFG% correlation
efg_corr, efg_p = pearsonr(
    final_df["REG_EFG_PCT"],
    final_df["PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"]
)

print("\n==============================")
print("CORRELATION RESULTS")
print("==============================")

print(f"TS% vs Playoff Win%")
print(f"Pearson Correlation: {ts_corr:.4f}")
print(f"P-value: {ts_p:.6f}\n")

print(f"EFG% vs Playoff Win%")
print(f"Pearson Correlation: {efg_corr:.4f}")
print(f"P-value: {efg_p:.6f}")

# --------------------------------------------
# VISUALIZATIONS
# --------------------------------------------

# TS% Scatter
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
plt.scatter(
    final_df["REG_TS_PCT"],
    final_df["PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"]
)

plt.xlabel("Regular Season TS%")
plt.ylabel("Playoff Win%")
plt.title("Regular Season TS% vs Playoff Win%")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()

# EFG% Scatter
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
plt.scatter(
    final_df["REG_EFG_PCT"],
    final_df["PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"]
)

plt.xlabel("Regular Season EFG%")
plt.ylabel("Playoff Win%")
plt.title("Regular Season EFG% vs Playoff Win%")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()

# --------------------------------------------
# OPTIONAL:
# VIEW TOP CORRELATED TEAMS
# --------------------------------------------

print("\nTop playoff teams by TS%:")
print(
    final_df.sort_values(
        by="REG_TS_PCT",
        ascending=False
    )[
        [
            "SEASON",
            "TEAM_NAME",
            "REG_TS_PCT",
            "PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"
        ]
    ].head(10)
)

print("\nTop playoff teams by EFG%:")
print(
    final_df.sort_values(
        by="REG_EFG_PCT",
        ascending=False
    )[
        [
            "SEASON",
            "TEAM_NAME",
            "REG_EFG_PCT",
            "PLAYOFF_WIN_PCT"
        ]
    ].head(10)
)
```
